name: Dune Trader
description: A caravan merchant and negotiator tied to the merchant houses. Skill Proficiencies: Animal Handling, Persuasion, Insight. Tool Proficiencies: Navigator's Tools, Cartographer's Tools, and either a Gaming Set or Musical Instrument. Equipment Option A: Navigator's Tools, 2 Pouches, Traveler's Clothes, 22 CP. Equipment Option B: 50 CP. Feature: Merchant House Membership.
